summary: Auto-Discovery Network Scanning Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working. Discovery panel shows 5 devices, 'Monitorato' badge appears after adding device, managed_ips list updates correctly.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/connector/start-discovery accepts client_id and subnet, creates request with status pending
GET /api/connector/discovery-check with X-API-Key returns scan_requested=true when pending
POST /api/connector/discovery-results with X-API-Key accepts device list and sets status to completed
GET /api/connector/discovery-results/{client_id} returns discovered devices with managed_ips
Discovery status shows 'completed' after results submitted
Adding discovered device via POST /api/connector/{client_id}/managed-devices works
Added device appears in managed_ips when getting discovery results
Discovery check requires API key (401 without)
Discovery results submission requires API key (401 without)
frontend_ui_tests: Connettori page loads with 'Scansione Rete' button visible
Discovery panel opens with client selector, subnet input, and 'Avvia Scansione' button
When client selected (86BIT_Office), existing discovery results auto-load
5 discovered devices shown with IP, hostname, open ports, ping latency, suggested type (SNMP/PING)
After adding, device shows 'Monitorato' badge instead of 'Aggiungi' button
Toast notification confirms device added: 'router.local aggiunto al monitoraggio'

seed_data_creation: Discovery results pre-loaded via backend tests: 5 devices (192.168.1.1 router.local, 192.168.1.2 switch.local, 192.168.1.3 server.local, 192.168.1.10 workstation1.local, 192.168.1.20 printer.local). Test device 192.168.1.1 was added during frontend testing and cleaned up after.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-Discovery feature fully verified. Backend endpoints: start-discovery (creates pending request), discovery-check (connector polls for requests), discovery-results (connector submits found devices), discovery-results/{client_id} (get results with managed_ips), discovery-status/{client_id} (get scan status). Frontend: Connettori page has 'Scansione Rete' button that opens discovery panel with client selector, subnet input, and scan button. When client selected, existing results auto-load. Discovered devices show IP, hostname, ports, latency, suggested type. 'Aggiungi' button adds device to monitoring, then shows 'Monitorato' badge.

verification_results.start_discovery_endpoint: POST /api/connector/start-discovery accepts client_id and subnet, creates pending request - VERIFIED
verification_results.discovery_check_endpoint: GET /api/connector/discovery-check with X-API-Key returns scan_requested when pending - VERIFIED
verification_results.discovery_results_endpoint: POST /api/connector/discovery-results with X-API-Key accepts device list - VERIFIED
verification_results.get_results_endpoint: GET /api/connector/discovery-results/{client_id} returns devices with managed_ips - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_discovery_button: Connettori page shows 'Scansione Rete' button - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_discovery_panel: Panel shows client selector, subnet input, scan button - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_auto_load_results: Selecting client auto-loads existing discovery results - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_device_display: Discovered devices show IP, hostname, ports, latency, suggested type - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_monitorato_badge: Already monitored devices show 'Monitorato' badge - VERIFIED
verification_results.frontend_add_device: Clicking 'Aggiungi' adds device and updates to 'Monitorato' badge - VERIFIED
